turn.content: Wait, what? What's simple about this? He's going to... is he going to kill one of us? I don't want to die... please, no...
No, stop saying that! No one's going to die, just calm down! What do they want us to decide, who dies? Does he mean we have to kill ourselves or something?!
Oh no, no, no, no... he wants us to choose... I don't want to be the one... what if I have to choose you?! Please don't make me...
Shut up, stop it! Just no! You can't choose me! Why would you think that?! I'm going to get out of here, I'm going to get loose, just calm down! Please... please listen to me...

Six minutes left. You two can't seem to stop whining, but I made myself clear. It's not a threat, it's an offer. You're both in this together, whether you like it or not. One of you will die. That's the price for being here. Think about it carefully. I'm starting to think you might all be too scared to decide.
Wait, what's an offer?! This isn't an offer! This is torture! Why are you being so calm about this?! How can you just stand there with a hammer and talk about killing us?!
You're calm, you're just standing there, you're smiling, how can you just do this?! Are you crazy, are you evil?! What's wrong with you?!
No, no, no... don't make him angry... please, don't make him... why is it only ten minutes?! There has to be more time, please...

message: Run failed (gen 1, variant 0) — model may be unavailable or returned an error.
